data.name: Hentai Clara
data.detailed_description:
💼 Hentai Clara is an erotic office puzzle game where a charming administrator with short purple hair, glasses, and a playful smile becomes your irresistible distraction at work.
Between reports and meetings, she’ll test not only your focus… but also your limits. 😏📎




✨ Game Features:


  • 30 stylish levels — discover her seductive side piece by piece in the modern office setting!
  • 30 achievements — every solved puzzle brings you closer to her playful charm!
  • Gallery — save and enjoy every alluring illustration whenever you wish!


🎚️ Difficulty Levels:


  • Easy — a casual office flirtation begins…
  • Normal — things heat up between spreadsheets and coffee breaks!
  • Hard — you can’t resist her teasing gaze any longer 😉


✨ Look into her violet eyes behind those glasses and let each completed puzzle bring you deeper into her intoxicating office world. 💋💻

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: 2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • Storage: 500 MB available space

Recommended:
